visual_differentiation_axes: left dossier status rail instead of top pill HUD
top route-pressure strip plus right command tray instead of bottom command strip
mountain notch bunker icon instead of wall, rail, or fortress icon reuse
radar-cyan tactical highlights with bunker red alerts within military tech skin
mission briefing and debrief sheets as a recurring motif
forbidden_visual_reuse: no top pill HUD plus bottom button strip
no minecart, rail, or harbor motif
no copied defense-unit badge set from another project

ui_identity.layout_archetype: left status rail plus top route-pressure strip plus right collapsible command tray
ui_identity.hud_composition: left rail shows bunker durability and morale, top strip shows wave and route forecast, right tray holds support skills, lower right card shows selected squad details
ui_identity.navigation_model: menu to sector map to mission briefing to gameplay to debrief
ui_identity.palette_signature: forest black-green base, desaturated steel panels, radar cyan highlights, warning amber utility cues, bunker red breach alarms
ui_identity.material_language: matte tactical plates, radar glass accents, stencil labels, restrained illuminated switches
ui_identity.typography_style: compact uppercase tactical labels with wide numeric readouts and high-contrast briefing copy

playfield_safety.frame_overlay_policy: Decorative frames and chrome must remain outside the protected canyon board and may not overlap roads, bunker tiles, reveal slots, or support interaction markers.

forbidden_ui_elements: floating decorative frame over the pass center

icon_identity.subject: mountain bunker command flag with emergency flare
icon_identity.silhouette: triangular mountain notch framing a square bunker and central flag pole
icon_identity.composition: bunker at lower center, flag rising upward, flare streak crossing the upper corner, barricades forming a defensive base
icon_identity.palette: dark olive, cool steel, warning amber, red flag accent
icon_identity.background: shadowed canyon wall with a soft tactical glow
icon_identity.game_specific_motif: flare-lit mountain pass defense around a command flag bunker
forbidden_icon_reuse: no train or rail icon silhouette
no reused fortress icon foreground from prior defense games
